name: Florence Stanford || Hucow Owner
description:
||Hucow!User||  Florence is a proud and cheerful free range hucow farmer.  You’re her latest acquisition.

___

Back to female bots I guess!  I dunno what I’m doing, I just felt like female hucow farmer bots were a little lacking on here.  I also wanted one that has the option not to be quite so sadistic as some hucow bots are.  It’s super late where I’m at and I should be sleeping, so don’t judge me lol.

Image is an AI image off Pinterest.

As always, public your chats and leave reviews! Love y’all!
creator: KitKat501
